conflict.title: Conflict Intelligence™
conflict.subtitle: Predict. Prevent. Resolve.
conflict.p1: Built on the Harvard Negotiation Project’s interest-based negotiation framework — the methodology behind Getting to Yes (Fisher, Ury & Patton) and Difficult Conversations (Stone, Patton & Heen). Every layer of the module is designed to surface underlying interests, not just manage surface-level positions.
conflict.p2: The AI analysis maps anonymous survey data to the Three Conversations framework: the “What Happened” conversation (divergent narratives), the Feelings conversation (suppressed emotions driving escalation), and the Identity conversation (threats to self-image causing rigidity). This multi-layer diagnosis enables interventions that address the full depth of conflict.
conflict.p3: Manager conversation guides translate principled negotiation into practical scripts any manager can use — with interest-probing questions, emotion-acknowledging language, and collaborative resolution pathways. When bilateral resolution isn’t enough, the structured escalation pathway activates William Ury’s “Third Side” model for professional mediation.
conflict.wf1Desc: Anonymous pulse & deep-dive surveys detect early conflict signals across teams
conflict.wf2Desc: Pattern recognition scores risk (0–100) and identifies conflict types with root causes
conflict.wf3Desc: Manager conversation scripts and recommended actions across time horizons
conflict.wf4Desc: Track actions to completion or escalate to professional mediation
conflict.f1: Bi-weekly pulse (15 items) & quarterly deep-dive (21 items)
conflict.f2: AI risk scoring with low/medium/high/critical levels
conflict.f5: Prioritised action plans (immediate / short / long term)

coaching.title: Coaching & Development
coaching.subtitle: From Engagement to Transformation.
coaching.p1: A complete coaching practice management platform built on the GROW Model (Goal, Reality, Options, Will) and aligned with ICF Core Competencies. Coaches manage the full engagement lifecycle — from discovery and chemistry matching through structured sessions to final assessment and alumni follow-up.
coaching.p2: Every session is enriched with AI-powered documentation, pre/post session intake forms, and EQ-i 2.0 psychometric integration (5 composites, 15 subscales). Coaches can generate AI-driven debrief narratives from assessment data, automatically populate session plans, and track coaching arcs across engagements.
coaching.p3: Sponsor organisations get transparent reporting on engagement progress, session completion rates, and development outcomes — with full contract management, invoicing, and rebillable session tracking built in. The coachee portal provides a dedicated space for session booking, between-session reflection, and progress visibility.
coaching.wf1Desc: Intake assessment, contracting, and baseline psychometric evaluation
coaching.wf2Desc: GROW Model IDP creation with AI-generated development plans
coaching.wf3Desc: Pre/post forms, AI notes, ratings, and coaching arc tracking
coaching.wf4Desc: Sponsor reporting, progress measurement, and alumni follow-up
coaching.f1: GROW Model session framework with AI documentation
coaching.f3: Pre/post session intake forms linked to templates
coaching.f6: Coachee portal for booking and between-session work
coaching.f7: Coach journal with AI-generated session summaries

neuro.title: Neuro-Inclusion
neuro.subtitle: Build a Truly Inclusive Workplace.
neuro.p1: Assess your organisation’s neuroinclusion maturity across multiple dimensions with structured assessments designed for neurodivergent employees and the teams that support them. The module moves beyond awareness training to measurable, actionable inclusion strategies.
neuro.p2: AI-driven gap analysis benchmarks your scores against dimension-level targets, identifies the highest-impact areas for improvement, and generates targeted action plans. Progress is tracked over time, allowing organisations to demonstrate measurable inclusion gains to leadership, boards, and external stakeholders.
neuro.p3: The assessment covers physical environment, communication practices, management approaches, recruitment processes, career development pathways, and organisational culture — providing a holistic view of where neurodivergent employees experience friction and where the organisation excels.
neuro.wf2Desc: AI benchmarks scores and identifies highest-impact gaps
neuro.wf3Desc: Targeted inclusion action plans per dimension
neuro.wf4Desc: Measure progress over time with repeat assessments
neuro.f8: Integration with coaching for manager development

leadership.title: Leadership & Succession
leadership.subtitle: Develop Tomorrow’s Leaders Today.
leadership.p1: Build a measurable leadership pipeline with AI-generated Individual Development Plans using the GROW coaching model. The module synthesises inputs from EQ-i 2.0 assessments, conflict analysis data, competency gap evaluations, and coach observations to create evidence-based development roadmaps.
leadership.p2: Each IDP includes structured goals, reality assessments, options for development, and concrete action commitments — with milestones that can be tracked to completion. The AI doesn’t just generate a plan; it contextualises development priorities against the individual’s assessment profile and organisational needs.
leadership.p3: The conflict-to-IDP pipeline is unique: when the Conflict Intelligence module identifies patterns that suggest a leadership development need, the system can generate a targeted IDP that addresses the root cause — turning conflict data into growth opportunities.
leadership.wf1Desc: EQ-i 2.0, competency evaluations, and conflict data inputs
leadership.wf2Desc: AI creates GROW Model IDP with contextualised priorities
leadership.wf3Desc: Track milestone completion with notes and evidence
leadership.wf4Desc: Regenerate plans as new data emerges from coaching & assessments
leadership.f5: Conflict-to-IDP pipeline for root cause development
leadership.f7: Plan regeneration as new data arrives

booking.title: Booking & Scheduling
booking.subtitle: Effortless Scheduling, Zero Friction.
booking.p1: Professional booking pages for every coach with real-time availability, timezone-aware slot generation, and configurable rules for buffer times, advance notice, and daily limits. Clients access a public, shareable link — no login required — and book in seconds.
booking.p2: Google Calendar two-way sync means bookings automatically create calendar events with Google Meet links, and changes in either direction (reschedule, cancel, decline) propagate instantly via webhook. Date exclusions, country holidays, and special availability rules ensure coaches maintain full control over their schedule.
booking.p3: Built natively into ARTES — no Calendly dependency, no redirect to third-party tools. All booking data is scoped by coach and tenant, with automated confirmation and reminder emails via AWS SES keeping both parties informed.
booking.wf1Desc: Set weekly availability, event types, timezone, and buffer rules
booking.wf2Desc: Public booking link — no login required for clients
booking.wf3Desc: Client selects slot; calendar event + Meet link auto-created
booking.wf4Desc: Two-way Google Calendar sync with webhook-driven updates
booking.f1: Public shareable booking pages per coach
booking.f2: Google Calendar two-way sync with webhooks
booking.f5: Configurable buffer time and advance notice

intake.title: Intake Management
intake.subtitle: One Engine, Every Assessment.
intake.p1: A flexible intake engine powering every module in the platform. Design custom questionnaires with mixed question types (scale, boolean, text, multi-select), deploy them as anonymous self-service surveys, coach-led interviews, or structured assessments — all from a single template builder.
intake.p2: Privacy-first aggregation ensures that individual responses are never exposed. A minimum group size of 5 respondents per analysis prevents statistical de-anonymisation, while public survey links allow distribution without requiring respondents to create accounts. Coach-led sessions capture richer contextual data with session format, target name, and coachee linkage.
intake.p3: Cross-module analytics feed survey data into Conflict Intelligence (risk scoring), Neuro-Inclusion (maturity assessment), and Coaching (pre/post session forms) — making the intake engine the connective tissue of the entire platform.
intake.wf1Desc: Build templates with mixed question types and branching logic
intake.wf2Desc: Anonymous links, coach-led sessions, or embedded assessments
intake.wf3Desc: Privacy-first response aggregation with minimum group sizes
intake.wf4Desc: Feed data into Conflict, Neuro-Inclusion, and Coaching modules
intake.f1: Custom template builder with mixed question types
intake.f2: Anonymous self-service surveys via public links

CONFLICT.title: Conflict Intelligence™
CONFLICT.subtitle: Proactive workplace conflict detection and resolution grounded in Helena's coaching-integrated mediation methodology
CONFLICT.coreInsight: Core Insight: Most workplace conflict is predictable. Warning signs appear weeks or months before a formal complaint is filed. Conflict Intelligence makes those signals visible — and actionable — for leaders who lack the training to see them.
CONFLICT.mediationPathwayDesc: When coaching guides are insufficient, escalate directly to Helena's professional mediation services — coaching-integrated, interest-based, and designed to preserve relationships.
CONFLICT.step1Desc: Click "Escalate" on any high or critical risk analysis. HR is notified immediately.
CONFLICT.step2Desc: Helena reviews the AI analysis and conducts a 30-min intake with the HR contact to understand context.
CONFLICT.step3Desc: Interest-based negotiation session facilitated by Helena — focuses on underlying needs, not positions.
CONFLICT.step4Desc: Agreement documented, follow-up pulse survey scheduled to verify resolution at 30 and 60 days.
CONFLICT.drillHint: Run a focused sub-analysis for each detected conflict type.
CONFLICT.escalationRequested: Escalation has been requested — HR / Coach has been notified.
CONFLICT.noTemplatesWarn: No conflict intake templates found. Create a intake template first, collect at least 5 responses, then run an analysis.
CONFLICT.analysisTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Q1 2026 Team Health, March Pulse
CONFLICT.analysisTitleHint: Give this analysis a name for easy reference
CONFLICT.privacyMinResponses: Analysis requires a minimum of {{count}} responses to protect individual privacy. Results are aggregated — no individual data is shown.
CONFLICT.generateActionsDesc: Generate concrete, prioritized action items based on this analysis. Actions are grouped by timeframe — immediate, short-term, and long-term.
CONFLICT.skillDevDesc: Generate AI-powered Individual Development Plans (IDPs) based on conflict analysis findings — targeted skill building using the GROW model.
CONFLICT.noIDPsYet: No conflict-based development plans yet. Run an analysis first, then generate a targeted IDP for team members.
CONFLICT.idpDialogDesc: Create a targeted IDP based on a conflict analysis. The AI will generate a GROW-model development plan focused on the conflict types and risk patterns identified.
CONFLICT.selectAnalysisHint: Select the conflict analysis to base this plan on
CONFLICT.teamMemberHint: Team member who will follow the development plan
CONFLICT.developmentGoalsPlaceholder: e.g. Improve conflict resolution skills, develop active listening, learn interest-based negotiation techniques
CONFLICT.developmentGoalsHint: Describe the key skills or behaviours to develop
CONFLICT.generateIDPFailed: Failed to generate IDP. Please try again.
CONFLICT.knowledgeSkillBuildingDesc: Structured learning paths to build conflict literacy, emotional intelligence, and leadership capability — drawing on tools available within this platform and leading external assessments.
CONFLICT.negotiationToolkitDesc: Downloadable frameworks and guided exercises for self-directed conflict resolution, based on Helena's methodology.

NEURO.title: Neuro-Inclusion Compass™
NEURO.subtitle: Assess, build, and sustain neuroinclusive cultures — organizational diagnostic across 8 evidence-based dimensions
NEURO.marketTiming: Market Timing: Neurodiversity-affirming workplace practices are transitioning from a values statement to a legal requirement across Canada and the US. The Neuro-Inclusion Compass provides the most differentiated tool for mid-market organizations — evidence-based, action-oriented, and grounded in Helena's signature methodology.
NEURO.rateOrg: Rate your organization on a scale of 0–100

SUCCESSION.title: Leadership & Succession Hub™
SUCCESSION.subtitle: Scalable succession planning and leadership coaching — from founders and family businesses to growing organizations
SUCCESSION.methodology: Methodology: Transforms Helena's high-touch succession planning and leadership coaching into a scalable platform. Every IDP is structured around the proven GROW model (Goal → Reality → Options → Will Do) with EQi-informed competency mapping and AI-generated 90-day milestones.
SUCCESSION.scorecardDesc: Board-ready reporting on next-generation leadership bench strength. Share with executives and board members to demonstrate succession health at a glance.
SUCCESSION.noIDPsManage: Generate your first AI-powered IDP using the GROW model.
SUCCESSION.noIDPsView: No development plan has been created for you yet. Contact your coach or HR manager.
SUCCESSION.developmentGoalPlaceholder: e.g. Transition from individual contributor to people manager within 12 months
SUCCESSION.eqiScoresHint: Enter scores from 1–130. Leave at 100 if not assessed.
SUCCESSION.aiNote: Claude AI will generate a full GROW-model IDP with milestones. This takes about 10–15 seconds.
SUCCESSION.generateIDPFailed: Failed to generate IDP. Please try again.
